summary: Five table-driven cases added to Test_describeReport map the new report-type keys (bgwriter, replslots, stat_io, stat_io_time, statements_jit) to their distinct description constants. They follow the existing convention exactly, pass the litmus test (each key resolves through describeReport's map to a unique constant; a missing/mis-wired entry would return the 'unknown description requested' fallback and fail the assert.Equal), the invalid fallback case remains last, and coverage is appropriate for a pure-wiring task. Tests are green.
